instructions: GitHub CLI tools for operations against remote GitHub repositories via the GitHub API. All tools require network connectivity and the commit/branch to be pushed to GitHub. This is NOT a replacement for local git — for local git operations (git show, git log, git diff, git status) use Bash directly. Use these tools exclusively for GitHub-specific data: pull requests, issues, CI runs, jobs, PR associations for pushed commits, code/repo/commit/discussion search, and repository file browsing. Use repo_tree and repo_file instead of WebFetch for GitHub URLs — they return clean data via the API instead of downloading ~200KB of HTML. Requires the gh CLI to be installed and authenticated (gh auth login). Configure a default repository via .mcp-gh-tooling.json to avoid passing 'repo' to every tool call.
